Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Perfected]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — The Perfected are powerful entities that can be dispatched to a location.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 5''' — The Perfected are enemies that the crew will follow Shyrax against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — The Perfected was one of the groups Starhammer fought during his conquest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — The crew is not yet prepared for a showdown against the Perfected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — Rumor states the King Regent's ships are led by one of his Perfected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — The Perfected are a type of Karoshan that possess long reptilian tails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — The Perfected are a group whose members possess sharper teeth than the average Karoshan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — The Perfected view battlefields as playgrounds.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — The Perfected were created by Karoshan research in genetic engineering.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — The Perfected have a single suicide agent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — The Perfected are a potential group responsible for subspace blockades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — A Perfected fleet was allowed through a gap in Shyrax's blockade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — The Perfected made a bid for control of the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — The Perfected are expected to arrive from Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — The Perfected possess a fleet of black ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — The Perfected are associated with Felrex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — The Perfected are considered one of the true enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — The Perfected are individuals created by sacrificing hundreds or thousands of Karoshans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — The creation process for the Perfected has a low survival rate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — The Perfected are casters that can escape into Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — The Perfected are an army being built by King Regent Felrex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — The Perfected are an enemy group associated with Karosha.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — The Perfected is a group that Tythalia recommends moving against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Perfected are a group led by King Regent Felrex described as a blight on the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Shyrax's target involves crushing a Perfected outpost and killing any Perfected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — The Zenith Cannon settled for one of the Perfected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The Perfected are an artificially created subspecies that serves as a ruling caste.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Benri Vallenar is tasked with proceeding with the Perfected research.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 35''' — The enemy might approach the Perfected directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — The Perfected are an enemy or target of Shyrax's resources.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Being Perfected allows for gathering support and increased ability.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
